name: LKS Holding Group Limited
summary: LKS Holding Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the interior fitting-out, renovation, alteration, and addition works for residential, industrial, and commercial properties in Hong Kong. It is also involved in structural alterations, structural steel works, signage works, building maintenance, refurbishment works, and ground improvement activities, as well as interior design works. The company serves contractors, landlords, and property developers. LKS Holding Group Limited was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
